text: The new dashboard is clean and loads noticeably faster. Great improvement.
I keep getting a 504 timeout when trying to export reports with more than 500 rows.
Onboarding was confusing. I spent 20 minutes looking for where to connect my data source.
Love the mobile app. The notification controls are exactly what I needed.
Our team is getting charged twice per month. We opened a ticket two weeks ago.
Would love a way to duplicate a workflow instead of rebuilding it from scratch.
Filter combinations on the analytics page are slow. Three filters takes eight seconds.
After yesterday's update, clicking Save on any form silently fails. Data is just lost.
The product is solid overall. I wish the keyboard shortcuts were documented.
Charts on the reports page are impossible to read on a phone screen.
